app.title: Impression Explorer
app.tagline: See where US advertising impressions concentrate.
hero.title: Every impression, placed on the map.
hero.lead: An analyst's lens on {count} ad views across the United States — by state, by device, by hour, and through the years.
section.map.title: Impression density
section.map.body: Impressions per US state — the deeper the colour, the denser.
scrolly.closing: But the story doesn't end on the map — it runs by the hour, by device, and through the years.
map.unattributed: {count} impressions fell outside any US state
map.error: Couldn't load the map. Please try again.
section.metrics.title: The metrics
chart.hour.title: Impressions by hour
chart.hour.localNote: Local hour per state · impressions without a state excluded
chart.device.title: Impressions per device
chart.device.subtitle: Devices grouped by how many impressions they sent
chart.device.stats: Mean {mean} · median {median} impressions per device · busiest sent {max} · {total} devices
chart.bf.title: Black Friday through the years
chart.bf.subtitle: The Black Friday day vs the mean of the year's other days
footer.note: Built for the Cuebiq full-stack challenge.
